# Monorepo CI Report Status

Aggregates per-project CI payload artifacts into one human-readable report and one status signal.

It supports two modes:

- `sonarqube`: evaluates each project's `sonar_outcome`
- `unit-tests`: evaluates each project's `tests_status`

The action can:

- write markdown to the job summary
- optionally upsert a PR comment
- optionally create/update a dedicated check run
- optionally fail the job if any project has issues

## Expected input artifacts

This action expects JSON payloads generated by `monorepo-project-ci-report`, usually downloaded from build matrix artifacts into `results_dir`.

Each payload must include `project` (or legacy `plugin`) and the relevant fields:

- Sonar mode: `sonar_outcome`
- Unit mode: `tests_status`, plus optional `test_outcome`, `junit_exists`, `coverage_exists`

## Usage

```yaml
- name: Publish SonarQube status
  uses: SolaceDev/solace-public-workflows/.github/actions/monorepo-ci-report-status@main
  with:
    check_type: sonarqube
    projects_json: ${{ needs.label-pr.outputs.all_plugins }}
    results_dir: ci-plugin-results
    github_token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
    check_name: "SonarQube Quality Gate"
    update_check_details: "true"
    fail_on_issues: "true"
```

```yaml
- name: Publish Unit Test status
  uses: SolaceDev/solace-public-workflows/.github/actions/monorepo-ci-report-status@main
  with:
    check_type: unit-tests
    projects_json: ${{ needs.label-pr.outputs.all_plugins }}
    results_dir: ci-plugin-results
    github_token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
    check_name: "Unit Tests"
    update_check_details: "true"
    fail_on_issues: "true"
```

## Inputs

| Input | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `check_type` | yes | - | `sonarqube` or `unit-tests` |
| `projects_json` | no | `""` | JSON list of changed projects |
| `results_dir` | no | `ci-plugin-results` | Directory containing CI payload JSON files |
| `github_token` | no | `${{ github.token }}` | Token for comments/check updates |
| `sonarqube_host_url` | no | `https://sonarq.solace.com` | SonarQube base URL |
| `check_name` | no | mode-based default | Check run name override |
| `comment_on_pr` | no | `false` | Upsert PR comment with report |
| `comment_marker` | no | mode-based default | Marker string for comment upsert |
| `pr_number` | no | `""` | Explicit PR number override |
| `update_check_details` | no | `true` | Create/update check-run details |
| `fail_on_issues` | no | `true` | Fail action when issues are present |

## Outputs

| Output | Description |
|---|---|
| `all_passed` | `true` when all evaluated projects passed |
| `project_results` | JSON rows used to build the report |
| `failing_projects` | JSON list of failing projects (unit mode) |
| `missing_projects` | JSON list of missing payload projects (unit mode) |
| `report_markdown` | Full markdown report text |

## Permissions

Recommended job permissions:

```yaml
permissions:
  checks: write
  pull-requests: write
  contents: read
```

- `checks: write` is required when `update_check_details: true`.
- `pull-requests: write` is required when `comment_on_pr: true`.
